title: ourisia microphylla
intro: Ourisia microphylla, also known as Rock Cress or Alpine Forget-me-not, is a flowering plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ourisia microphylla include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Ourisia microphylla can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in skincare products due to its antioxidant and anti-aging properties.
